title: pilosella × bifurca subsp. retzensis
intro: Pilosella × bifurca subsp. retzensis is a rare, sterile hybrid plant that is a cross between two species of Pilosella, a genus of flowering plants in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella × bifurca subsp. retzensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
